column6:
- Captouch enabled

- Captouch threashold = 25

- Like CCL1 but with 8-bit keypad output


THE ONLY WAY TO TEST CAPTOUCH is to verify the UUID changes for ~5 seconds after triggering captouch. No other message is sent by the reader to signal a captouch message.

In NRF connect, the "Complete list of 128-bit Service UUIDs" will display this change when captouch is triggered.

column2: Contains Kc1 of Lk50018 and Kv1 of Lk00001
